info.name: Google Sheets API
info.description:
The Google Sheets API lets you read, write, and format data in Google Sheets. It supports creating spreadsheets, reading and writing cell values, updating formatting, managing sheets within a spreadsheet, and working with developer metadata.

Contact Support:
 Name: Google Workspace Developer Support

item.name: Google Sheets Get Values From a Range

query.description: The major dimension that results should use.
How values should be represented in the output.
How dates, times, and durations should be represented in the output.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve or modify.
(Required) The A1 notation or R1C1 notation of the range to read or modify. For example, Sheet1!A1:D5 or Sheet1!R1C1:R5C4.

request.description: Returns a range of values from a spreadsheet. The caller must specify the spreadsheet ID and a range.

response.name: Successful response containing the requested values.

item.name: Google Sheets Append Values to a Range

query.description: (Required) How the input data should be interpreted.
How the input data should be inserted.
Determines if the update response should include the values of the cells that were appended.
Determines how values in the response should be rendered.
Determines how dates, times, and durations in the response should be rendered.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve or modify.

request.description: Appends values to a spreadsheet. The input range is used to search for existing data and find a table within that range. Values will be appended to the next row of the table, starting with the first column of the table.

response.name: Successful response containing the append result.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Sheets Clear Values From a Range

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve or modify.

request.description: Clears values from a spreadsheet. The caller must specify the spreadsheet ID and range. Only values are cleared; all other properties of the cell (such as formatting and data validation) are kept.

response.name: Successful response containing the cleared range.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Sheets Get Values From Ranges Matching Data Filters

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve or modify.

request.description: Returns one or more ranges of values that match the specified data filters. The caller must specify the spreadsheet ID and one or more DataFilters. Ranges that match any of the data filters in the request will be returned.

response.name: Successful response containing the requested values.

item.name: Google Sheets Copy a Sheet to Another Spreadsheet

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve or modify.

request.description: Copies a single sheet from a spreadsheet to another spreadsheet. Returns the properties of the newly created sheet.

response.name: Successful response containing the properties of the copied sheet.

item.name: Google Sheets Batch Update a Spreadsheet

request.description: Applies one or more updates to the spreadsheet. Each request is validated before being applied. If any request is not valid, the entire request will fail and nothing will be applied.

response.name: Successful response containing the batch update results.

item.name: Google Sheets Get a Spreadsheet by Data Filter

request.description: Returns the spreadsheet at the given ID. The caller must specify the spreadsheet ID. This method differs from getSpreadsheet in that it allows selecting which subsets of spreadsheet data to return by specifying a dataFilters parameter.

response.name: Successful response containing the spreadsheet.
